title: 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' is Disney's lowest-ever Star Wars film opening
summary_full: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied and estimated $82 million in domestic ticket sales through its first three days in theaters.
summary_public: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied and estimated $82 million in domestic ticket sales through its first three days in theaters.
